requirement_topic.en: Tuvalu Market Access — DoE / TEC Roles and Nascent EV Demand
requirement_topic.zh: 图瓦卢市场准入——DoE / TEC角色及早期电动车需求
requirement_topic.zht: 圖瓦盧市場准入——DoE / TEC角色及早期電動車需求

summary.en: Tuvalu is a small Pacific island economy with high-income tourism demand, strong solar and SIDS decarbonisation policy signals, and a nascent EV charging market. Relevant gates are split across DoE for standards, DoE for energy-sector regulation, and TEC for utility connection and installation acceptance. Importers should verify whether the charger model, HS code, smart/radio functions, labelling, and installation site trigger specific Department of Energy and TEC conformity, DoE regulatory, customs, or TEC project-approval requirements before shipment.
summary.zh: 图瓦卢是太平洋小型岛屿经济体，具有高收入旅游需求、强烈太阳能和小岛屿发展中国家减碳政策信号，电动汽车充电市场仍处早期。相关关口分散在DoE标准、DoE能源行业监管、TEC公用事业接入和安装验收之间。进口商应在出货前核实充电桩型号、HS编码、智能/无线功能、标签和安装场址是否触发具体DoE合格评定、DoE监管、海关或TEC项目审批要求。
summary.zht: 圖瓦盧是太平洋小型島嶼經濟體，具有高收入旅遊需求、強烈太陽能和小島嶼發展中國家減碳政策信號，電動汽車充電市場仍處早期。相關關口分散在DoE標準、DoE能源行業監管、TEC公用事業接入和安裝驗收之間。進口商應在出貨前核實充電樁型號、HS編碼、智能/無線功能、標籤和安裝場址是否觸發具體DoE合格評定、DoE監管、海關或TEC項目審批要求。

standards_or_laws: Tuvalu Department of Energy national standards and conformity role
Tuvalu Department of Energy energy-sector regulation
Tuvalu Electricity Corporation utility connection and installation acceptance
Tuvalu renewable-energy and energy-efficiency policy context for SIDS decarbonisation

summary.en: China EV charger suppliers commonly rely on domestic GB/T design evidence, China-market labelling, Chinese cloud or payment systems, and domestic operator references. These may support technical review but do not establish Tuvalu market access. China CCC or GB/T documentation, if available, must be mapped to Tuvalu project requirements, IEC evidence, importer responsibilities, and TEC connection approval.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩供应商通常依赖国内GB/T设计证据、中国市场标签、中国云平台或支付系统，以及国内运营商案例。这些资料可支持技术审查，但不能证明图瓦卢市场准入。中国CCC或GB/T文件如有，应映射至图瓦卢项目要求、IEC证据、进口商责任和TEC接入批准。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁供應商通常依賴國內GB/T設計證據、中國市場標籤、中國雲平台或支付系統，以及國內運營商案例。這些資料可支持技術審查，但不能證明圖瓦盧市場准入。中國CCC或GB/T文件如有，應映射至圖瓦盧項目要求、IEC證據、進口商責任和TEC接入批准。

gap.en: Exporters should build a Tuvalu package around the specific importer and site: IEC 61851 and IEC 62196 evidence, IEC 61000 EMC data, 240/415 V 50 Hz validation, coastal derating, English labelling and manuals, radio-module data, tariff or metering assumptions, spare-part support for islands, and written TEC / project-owner acceptance. Because the EV market is nascent, tender specifications may be more decisive than a mature national EVSE rulebook.
gap.zh: 出口商应围绕具体进口商和场址准备图瓦卢资料包：IEC 61851和IEC 62196证据、IEC 61000 EMC数据、240/415 V 50 Hz验证、沿海降额、英文标签和手册、无线模块数据、电价或计量假设、岛屿备件支持，以及TEC / 项目业主书面验收。由于电动车市场尚处早期，招标规范可能比成熟国家EVSE规则手册更具决定性。
gap.zht: 出口商應圍繞具體進口商和場址準備圖瓦盧資料包：IEC 61851和IEC 62196證據、IEC 61000 EMC數據、240/415 V 50 Hz驗證、沿海降額、英文標籤和手冊、無線模組數據、電價或計量假設、島嶼備件支持，以及TEC / 項目業主書面驗收。由於電動車市場尚處早期，招標規範可能比成熟國家EVSE規則手冊更具決定性。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — DoE, DoE, customs, radio, and TEC obligations depend on the product configuration, HS code, communications modules, and installation site; TEC acceptance is mandatory for grid-connected installations
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T or CCC status is not a Tuvalu market-access substitute; documents must be remapped to Tuvalu project, IEC, and utility requirements

source.publisher: Tuvalu Department of Energy, Ministry of Public Utilities and Infrastructure

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Tuvalu is an opportunity market for IEC-aligned EV chargers, but exporters should not treat it as a paperwork-only extension of China GB/T supply. Confirm DoE, DoE, customs, radio-module, and TEC project requirements for the exact charger and site before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 图瓦卢是IEC体系充电桩的机会市场，但出口商不应将其视为中国GB/T供货的简单文件延伸。出货前应针对具体充电桩和场址确认DoE、DoE、海关、无线模块和TEC项目要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 圖瓦盧是IEC體系充電樁的機會市場，但出口商不應將其視為中國GB/T供貨的簡單文件延伸。出貨前應針對具體充電樁和場址確認DoE、DoE、海關、無線模組和TEC項目要求。
